notes: Collected real ssh rvv compile/link/run evidence for the bounded i32-vmul RVV+scalar dispatch target artifact bundle through the tcrv-plan-and-export-target-artifact-bundle front door. Evidence JSON records ssh_evidence_verified=true, remote architecture riscv64, remote clang Ubuntu clang version 18.1.3 (1ubuntu1), compile/link/run success, source/header/object artifact hashes/paths, and both rvv_available=0 and rvv_available=1 branch coverage. No throughput, latency, ratio, or performance claim was made.
